name: feeflow
description: Automated fee reconciliation infrastructure for Nigerian educational institutions (Nomba Hackathon 2026)

scripts.dev: pnpm run build:core && concurrently -n frontend,backend -c blue,green "pnpm --filter frontend dev" "pnpm --filter backend start:dev"
scripts.dev:backend: pnpm run build:core && pnpm --filter backend start:dev
scripts.build: pnpm run build:core && pnpm --filter frontend build && pnpm --filter backend build
